subcodes.first_line: We have expounded the Point and made manifest therefrom the knowledge of what hath been and what shall be, and have caused all things to testify unto that which they witness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا فصلنا النقطه و اظهرنا منها علم ما کان و ما یکون و انطقنا الاشیاء بما شهد
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
